providers.name: Allways
providers.notes: Seed provider entry for the Allways SN7 pilot.

providers.name: Bitstarter
providers.notes: Provider entry for Bitstarter SN91 public website and app surfaces. No verified source repository or machine-readable API schema has been found yet.

providers.name: BlockMachine
providers.notes: Bittensor subnet/provider for verifiable RPC infrastructure. Tracked as adjacent infra provider, not generic Metagraphed hosting.

providers.name: Byzantium
providers.notes: Provider entry for Byzantium SN76 website. Public docs/API/common-path candidates are currently 404 and are not promoted.

providers.name: Chutes
providers.notes: Provider entry for Chutes SN64 website, docs, SDK, miner, validator/API source repositories, app catalog, and public pricing data.

providers.name: Coldint
providers.notes: Provider entry for Coldint SN29 website, validator repository, dynamic configuration repository, and referenced public training dataset.

providers.name: Desearch
providers.notes: Provider entry for Desearch SN22 website, docs, public OpenAPI schema, console, and subnet source repository.

providers.name: Dwellir
providers.notes: Bittensor RPC provider with documented HTTP/WSS examples. API-key URLs are not published as public registry endpoints.

providers.name: EvolAI
providers.notes: Provider entry for EvolAI SN47 source repository and referenced public Hugging Face dataset.

providers.name: FlameWire
providers.notes: Bittensor RPC/API infrastructure provider. Keyed examples remain provider capability metadata until a public-safe endpoint is verified.

providers.name: GetBlock
providers.notes: Bittensor node provider. API-key gated endpoints are tracked as provider capability, not public probeable surfaces.

providers.name: Gittensor
providers.notes: Seed provider entry for the Gittensor SN74 pilot.

providers.name: Green Compute
providers.notes: Provider entry for Green Compute SN110 official website, model directory, and advertised API surface.

providers.name: Handshake58
providers.notes: Provider entry for Handshake58 SN58 marketplace, API, OpenAPI, and subnet source repositories.

providers.name: Hippius
providers.notes: Provider entry for Hippius SN75 website, docs, blockchain API docs, validator repository, and storage miner repository.

providers.name: InfiniteHash
providers.notes: Provider entry for InfiniteHash SN89 source repository. The repository homepage points to infinitehash.xyz, but that deployment currently returns HTTP 402 and is not promoted as a monitored website surface.

providers.name: Luminar Network
providers.notes: Provider entry for Luminar Network SN87 official website, docs, and demo surfaces.

providers.name: Macrocosmos
providers.notes: Provider entry for Macrocosmos SN13 Data Universe website, documentation, source repositories, and public product surfaces.

providers.name: Metagraphed
providers.notes: Registry and probe observations are not protocol authority.

providers.name: NATIX
providers.notes: Provider entry for NATIX SN72 StreetVision website, whitepaper, source repository, product page, and Hugging Face organization.

providers.name: Nepher Robotics
providers.notes: Provider entry for Nepher Robotics SN49 official website, documentation, source repository, tournament app, and OpenAPI-backed API.

providers.name: Nodies
providers.notes: Public RPC provider referenced by public endpoint directories. Exact endpoint entries require active verification before promotion.

providers.name: OnFinality
providers.notes: Bittensor Finney RPC provider. Public endpoints are rate limited and suitable for testing according to provider docs.

providers.name: OpenTensor
providers.notes: Official Bittensor network and Subtensor endpoint documentation source.

providers.name: ReadyAI
providers.notes: Provider entry for ReadyAI SN33 website, Conversation Genome source repository, public dataset, and generated llms.txt data repository.

providers.name: Ridges
providers.notes: Provider entry for Ridges SN62 source repository. The public website currently rate-limits simple probes and is not promoted as a monitored surface in this overlay.

providers.name: SILX Labs
providers.notes: Provider entry for the SILX Labs Quasar SN24 website, source repository, and public model artifacts.

providers.name: TaoMarketCap
providers.notes: Third-party Bittensor market and subnet API. Used only as enrichment and candidate discovery, not canonical subnet existence authority.

providers.name: Taopedia Articles
providers.notes: Public article source for Taopedia. Used to discover documentation candidates, not verified operational surfaces.

providers.name: Taostats
providers.notes: Bittensor explorer, API, SDK, and hosted RPC provider. API-key gated services are not published as public probeable surfaces.

providers.name: Tensorplex subnet-docs
providers.notes: Structured community-maintained subnet documentation. Used as enrichment and candidate discovery pending maintainer review.

providers.name: Tensorplex
providers.notes: Provider entry for Tensorplex Dojo SN52 docs, source repository, UI repository, and worker API repository.

providers.name: Unarbos
providers.notes: Provider entry for Unarbos Ninja SN66 website, source repositories, public health surface, and Swagger UI.

providers.name: Verathos
providers.notes: Provider entry for Verathos SN96 website, docs, source repository, public OpenAPI schema, chat app, and safe model-list API.
